title: coelogyne nitida
intro: Coelogyne nitida, also known as the 'Smooth Coelogyne', is a species of orchid native to India and the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Coelogyne nitida include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to harness its therapeutic properties.
